description: A rancher wants to create a new virtual fence to confine cattle to a specific area of a large pasture without using physical fences.

nodes.task_description: Display a satellite map of the pasture.
Allow the rancher to draw a polygon on the map to define the virtual fence boundary.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully captures the polygon drawn by the user.

nodes.task_description: Save the new polygon as a virtual fence and apply it to the GPS collars of the cattle in that pasture.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully creates the geofence and updates the animal collars.
